positive: Minimalist abstract celestial mountain range silhouette, composed of overlapping, interlocking geometric rock formations that evoke mountain peaks and constellations. The primary color palette is deep sapphire blue and electric cyan against a vibrant indigo gradient background. Use strong, defined lines and a clean, modern, flat-design aesthetic. The style should be a blend of Art Deco geometry and ethereal, stylized nature. Composition must be centered and symmetrical, optimized for apparel printing. Include subtle glowing nebula dust visible within the crevices of the rocks. The light source is implied and diffused, creating strong, legible contrast between the dark silhouettes and the bright background.
